intake.object_under_review: anima sibling repo R49+ batch (rounds 49/50/51) + R44 promotion request
intake.scope: absorb anima rounds emitted since R48 (yesterday's nexus boost); adjudicate whether R44 hard-problem framework graduates from CONDITIONAL conjecture to Tier-1
intake.interpretation: anima emitted 4 new round-witness entries (rounds 49/50/51) since the R48 nexus boost. These constitute a de-facto R49+ batch already produced upstream — nexus's job is absorption with verdict preservation. Separately, the user posed a binary: (a) launch R49 batch OR (b) elevate R44. Evidence ground favors (a): R49+ entries have explicit verdicts already; R44 elevation would violate the 4-criteria gate (C1/C2 NOT_MET) and set a precedent that 'falsifiers exist' = 'Tier-1', which contradicts R34/R36/R42/R43 precedents that NEGATIVE/CONDITIONAL verdicts are first-class outcomes.

falsifiers_preregistered.name: honesty-no-overpromotion

falsifiers_preregistered.verdict: PASS — over-promotion refused via @P arp_promotion_honesty_clause governance entry
